commands.description: Single-line comment syntax to document code within a script or REPL session.
The 'abort' or 'stop' operator, used to terminate execution or signal an error state in complex functions.
Power operator (exponentiation), used for repeated multiplication or scaling values.
The 'iota' function, used to generate integer sequences (e.g., ⍳5 yields 1 2 3 4 5).
Reverse function, used to flip the order of elements in an array or vector.
